Blueberry Funded 15% OFF Deal

Blueberry Funded is offering traders a 15% discount on all forex challenge accounts using code BERRY15. This discount provides immediate savings at checkout and opens the door to one of the most unique prop trading environments available — one that is directly backed by an ASIC-regulated broker, giving it a level of execution integrity and capital reliability that purely prop-only firms cannot match.

Blueberry Funded is the prop trading arm of Blueberry Markets, an Australian broker regulated by ASIC (Australian Securities and Investments Commission). This broker-backed model means that traders benefit from institutional-grade liquidity, direct market access, and the financial stability of a regulated entity rather than relying on a standalone prop firm's balance sheet. This is a significant structural advantage for traders concerned about payout reliability.

With code BERRY15, you save 15% on any Blueberry Funded challenge tier. Beyond the discount, traders who pass evaluation gain access to real trading conditions backed by direct liquidity — not simulated fills or synthetic pricing. There are no time limits imposed during the evaluation, giving you the flexibility to trade at your own pace without artificial urgency.

Blueberry Funded's trading conditions emphasize execution quality above all else. Traders benefit from tight spreads sourced through the broker's institutional liquidity network, support for MT4 and MT5 platforms, and a challenge structure with clearly defined profit targets and drawdown limits. The ASIC-regulated backing also means the firm operates under strict financial compliance requirements.

To claim this deal, click the affiliate link above to reach Blueberry Funded, choose your preferred challenge account, and enter BERRY15 at checkout. Your 15% savings will be applied immediately to the order total. Given the unique broker-backed structure of this firm, this deal is especially valuable for traders who prioritize execution quality and regulatory security.
